label: In-context & test-time learning

node.label: In-context & test-time learning
node.definition: Behavior adapts from context, demonstrations, feedback, or computation at inference time without conventional retraining.
node.why_it_matters: The role of In-context & test-time learning is to connect Self-supervised learning, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines, Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning.
examples: substrate for Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: In-context & test-time learning follows the learning setup expressed by Self-supervised learning.
In-context & test-time learning uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
In-context & test-time learning uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
In-context & test-time learning follows the learning setup expressed by Meta-learning.

sentence_units.text: Behavior adapts from context, demonstrations, feedback, or computation at inference time without conventional retraining.
